readings.Aries: Forward movement is your default. Just confirm that forward is still the right direction. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Taurus: Beauty is not frivolous to you — it's structural. Without it, you cannot function well. What worked before will not work the same way this time.
readings.Gemini: The question you keep asking is really a different question underneath. Find it. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Cancer: What you call being cautious is sometimes waiting to feel safe enough to begin. You may never feel safe enough. Begin anyway. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Leo: The performance you're giving is excellent. There is something you're not saying behind it. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Virgo: Something small is adding up to something significant. Your instinct to track it is correct. The first instinct was right.
readings.Libra: There is a preference you've been masking as uncertainty. Name the preference. The first instinct was right.
readings.Scorpio: There is a relationship that exists entirely underground between you and someone else. It deserves light. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Sagittarius: There is a person who has expanded your worldview more than you've acknowledged. Acknowledge it. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Capricorn: The coldness others perceive is not who you are. It is how you move through uncertain terrain. Let someone know. Let this one be easy.
readings.Aquarius: You process the world through systems. There is one person who doesn't fit the system and you keep thinking about them. That's data. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Pisces: Something you believed in has faded. The fading is not failure — it is information about what you actually believe. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
